source_evidence.quote: Drawing plans are prepared as one PDF while supporting documents are separate PDFs.

required_user_facts.question: What contractor license status should be used for this DevHub application?
required_user_facts.reason: DevHub options can depend on contractor license information.

required_documents.question: Do you have the drawing plan set prepared as one PDF, with supporting documents separated?
required_documents.reason: PP&D online plan guidance distinguishes the plan set PDF from other supporting PDFs.
